headline: Is Trimble Inc. (TRMB) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is TRMB a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Trimble Inc. on Capital Blueprint’s Substack by Jin. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on TRMB. Trimble Inc.’s share was trading at $52.58 as of July 1st. TRMB’s trailing and forward P/E were 27.50 and 14.66 respectively according to Yahoo […]
